message:
Fix shared library error handling with wrapper pattern

CRITICAL BUG FIX: Shared library mode (.so files) couldn't handle errors.

Problem: Shared libraries export pub export fn pyx_main() callconv(.c) c_int which can't use try statements.

Solution: Wrapper pattern where pyx_main() catches errors from _pyx_main_impl().

Test Results: 36/80 -> 40/80 passing (50% pass rate, +4 tests fixed).
